---
title: "Eye tracking and attribute ordering in multi-attribute health choices"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Eye tracking and attribute ordering in multi-attribute health choices | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Research on how attribute order and attention shape information acquisition and choice behaviour in discrete choice experiments."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell narrow"><p class="eyebrow">Project</p><h1>Eye tracking and attribute ordering in multi-attribute health choices</h1><p class="lead">Research on how attribute order and attention shape information acquisition and choice behaviour in discrete choice experiments.</p></div></header><section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow"><h2>Research question and relevance</h2><p>Research on how attribute order and attention shape information acquisition and choice behaviour in discrete choice experiments.</p><h2>Methods and outputs</h2><p>Methods include health economics, applied econometrics, discrete choice experiments, stated-preference methods, decision-support modelling and policy translation where relevant.</p><p><a href="/publications/">Related publications</a> · <a href="/tools/">Related tools</a></p></div></section>
```
